evals.prompt: i want to add clerk authentication to my plasmo chrome extension popup. users should be able to sign in and see their profile. show me the full popup.tsx setup.
evals.expected_output: popup.tsx with ClerkProvider configured with CRX URL redirects, Show components for signed-in/out states, UserButton
expectations: Uses ClerkProvider from @clerk/chrome-extension with publishableKey
Sets afterSignOutUrl, signInFallbackRedirectUrl, signUpFallbackRedirectUrl to chrome-extension:// URLs using chrome.runtime.getURL('.')
Uses Show when='signed-in' and Show when='signed-out' for conditional rendering
Includes UserButton for signed-in state and SignInButton/SignUpButton for signed-out
Reads publishableKey from process.env.PLASMO_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY

evals.prompt: my background service worker needs to make authenticated API calls to my server. how can it access the current user's session token?
evals.expected_output: Background script uses message passing from the popup/content script to get the token, or uses chrome.storage to retrieve cached token
expectations: Explains that Clerk context is not available directly in service workers
Shows message passing pattern: popup/content script sends token to background
OR shows reading token from chrome.storage.local or chrome.storage.session
Background script uses chrome.runtime.onMessage.addListener to receive token
Includes how to make authenticated fetch with the received token

evals.prompt: my content script needs to check if the user is signed in before injecting a UI overlay into the page. how do i access clerk auth state from a content script?
evals.expected_output: Content script sends message to background/popup to check auth state, or reads from chrome.storage
expectations: Explains that Clerk React hooks are NOT available in content scripts (isolated world)
Uses chrome.runtime.sendMessage to request auth state from background or popup
OR reads cached auth state from chrome.storage
Shows how to conditionally inject UI based on the response
Handles the async nature of message passing

evals.prompt: my extension needs to work with a web app that uses clerk auth on the same domain. how do i set up cross-origin authentication so the extension can read auth state from the web app?
evals.expected_output: Explains syncSessionWithTab option or using webNavigation permissions to read the session from the web app
expectations: References the syncSessionWithTab prop on ClerkProvider or equivalent cross-origin auth feature
Mentions required manifest permissions (tabs, webNavigation, cookies, or specific host permissions)
Explains that the extension and web app must share the same Clerk application
Shows how to configure ClerkProvider to sync with the active tab's session
Notes the allowed origins must include the extension URL in Clerk Dashboard

evals.prompt: i want to persist the clerk session across extension reloads and browser restarts. how do i configure chrome.storage.sync to keep the user signed in?
evals.expected_output: Uses tokenCache prop on ClerkProvider with a custom chrome.storage.sync implementation
expectations: Uses the tokenCache prop on ClerkProvider to provide a custom storage backend
Implements get and set methods using chrome.storage.sync or chrome.storage.local
Handles the async nature of chrome.storage APIs
Explains the difference between chrome.storage.sync (cross-device) and chrome.storage.local
Does NOT use localStorage (not available in service workers)

evals.prompt: my plasmo extension keeps getting a different CRX ID on each rebuild, which breaks the clerk redirect URLs. how do i create a stable CRX ID?
evals.expected_output: Generates an RSA key pair, creates .env.chrome with CRX_PUBLIC_KEY, updates package.json to use it, adds the stable CRX URL to Clerk Dashboard
expectations: Generates an RSA 2048-bit key pair using openssl
Adds public key to .env.chrome as CRX_PUBLIC_KEY
Updates package.json to include key field pointing to the env var
Explains how to derive the CRX ID from the public key
Mentions adding the chrome-extension://STABLE_CRX_ID URL to Clerk Dashboard allowed origins
